dimensions.evidence: Requeue guidance (authoritative) says 'do NOT create a second copy under internal/engine/' and to extend existing internal/language_tiers/ — diff creates new internal/engine/language_tiers.go and _test.go in the forbidden location instead.

Only 3 files changed and the substance (registry, Tier enum, 3 tests) matches plan intent, but the files are placed in the wrong package, violating the requeue directive that explicitly forbade internal/engine/ placement.
KnownLanguages() iterates the real extToLanguage map (not hardcoded), all 3 tests assert genuine behavior with no deleted/weakened tests or forced expected values.

Creating a second tier system in internal/engine/ when internal/language_tiers/ already exists per #29 introduces a duplicate registry surface that could diverge and confuse consumers — a code-organization regression risk.

failureReasons: Requeue guidance (authoritative) forbids creating files under internal/engine/ — must extend existing internal/language_tiers/ package instead. Diff adds internal/engine/language_tiers.go and _test.go in direct violation.
The existing internal/language_tiers/ package from #29 already has a tier classifier; this diff creates a competing/duplicate system rather than extending the established one.
